CL-S-01.text: Bankingiz xizmati dahshat! Hech kim yordam bermadi, vaqtimni bekor o'tkazdim.
CL-S-01.hint: Faqat bitta javob: positive / negative / neutral

CL-S-02.text: Onlayn banking ilovasi juda qulay, hammasi oddiy va tushunarli. Har kuni ishlataman.
CL-S-02.hint: Faqat bitta javob: positive / negative / neutral

CL-S-03.text: Dollar kursi bugun qancha ekanligini bilmoqchiman.
CL-S-03.hint: Faqat bitta javob: positive / negative / neutral

CL-S-04.text: Karta bir hafta bo'ldi chiqmayapti. Bu bankdan boshqa joyga o'taman!
CL-S-04.hint: Faqat bitta javob: positive / negative / neutral

CL-S-05.text: Menejerlar juda muloyim va professional. Rahmat, shunaqa xizmat bo'lsa yaxshi.
CL-S-05.hint: Faqat bitta javob: positive / negative / neutral

CL-S-06.hint: Faqat bitta javob: positive / negative / neutral

CL-S-07.text: Ikki soat navbatda turdim, kassir hali ham chiqmadi. Bu nima degani?!
CL-S-07.hint: Faqat bitta javob: positive / negative / neutral

CL-S-08.text: Kredit berishdi, hujjatlar tez ko'rib chiqildi. Juda mamnunman!
CL-S-08.hint: Faqat bitta javob: positive / negative / neutral

CL-I-01.text: Kartamni yo'qotib qo'ydim, iltimos bloklab qo'ying.
CL-I-01.hint: Faqat bitta so'z yozing: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

CL-I-02.text: Hisobimda hozir qancha pul borligini bilmoqchiman.
CL-I-02.hint: Faqat bitta so'z yozing: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

CL-I-03.text: Do'stimga 500 ming so'm o'tkazmoqchiman, qanday qilaman?
CL-I-03.hint: Faqat bitta so'z yozing: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

CL-I-04.text: Ipoteka krediti olish uchun qanday hujjatlar kerak?
CL-I-04.hint: Faqat bitta so'z yozing: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

CL-I-05.text: Yangi joriy hisob raqam ochmoqchiman, nimadan boshlayman?
CL-I-05.hint: Faqat bitta so'z yozing: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

CL-I-06.text: Bugun evro va dollar kursi qancha?
CL-I-06.hint: Faqat bitta so'z yozing: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

CL-I-07.text: Sizning xizmatingizdan juda norozi edim, rasmiy shikoyat qoldirmoqchiman.
CL-I-07.hint: Faqat bitta so'z yozing: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

CL-I-08.text: Oxirgi 3 oylik bank hisobidan rasmiy ko'chirma kerak.
CL-I-08.hint: Faqat bitta so'z yozing: card_block / balance_inquiry / transfer / loan_inquiry / account_opening / exchange_rate / complaint / document_request

CL-R-01.text: Bro, plastikni qayta chiqarish qancha turadi, bilasanmi?
CL-R-01.hint: Faqat bitta so'z yozing: formal / informal / slang

CL-R-02.text: Plastik kartani qayta rasmiylashtirish tartibi va tegishli to'lov miqdori haqida ma'lumot bering.
CL-R-02.hint: Faqat bitta so'z yozing: formal / informal / slang

CL-R-03.text: Yangi karta olsam bo'ladimi, eskisi eskirib qoldi shekilli.
CL-R-03.hint: Faqat bitta so'z yozing: formal / informal / slang

CL-R-04.text: Bro, pul o'tkazmasini qanday qilaman? Gruzit qilib yubor menga.
CL-R-04.hint: Faqat bitta so'z yozing: formal / informal / slang
